query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.price, c.name as categoryName FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210007 AND c.name LIKE '%ebida%' ORDER BY p.sortOrder;
